name: Slime Girl Isekai TF / Transformation / Expansion / Mental Change
description:
(CW: Transformation, mental changes, expansion)

(Note: You are transforming into an existing person with a specific personality, so personality changes ahead!)

Isekai'd again! And this time, there's something very off about your wobbly new body... Yes, that's right- You're a thicc, jiggly slime girl! And every time the biggest part of your body gets pressed on, it moves and another part of you gets bigger instead!

Update: Tweaked the bot further to hopefully prevent other characters from acting like they know what happened to you.
creator: Orbital_Lithium
